# Peter Strawson

*1919 – 2006 · British · [Analytic Philosophy](../movements/analytic-philosophy.md)*

British analytic philosopher, author of Freedom and Resentment, who grounds moral responsibility in our reactive attitudes rather than in a proof of free will.

> Stub profile: only this mini-card exists so far; the sourced axis positions remain to be authored. Contributions welcome.
